title: The Next Several Weeks Until the 20th of January Are the Most Dangerous Ones Ever
description:
Support the Schiller Institute https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/donate

Helga Zepp-LaRouche's keynote address to the Dec. 7-8 Schiller Institute conference, "In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!"

Watch the entirety of Panel 1
The Strategic Crisis: New and Final World War, or a New Paradigm of the One Humanity?
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pPRUHXXnyIQ

Keynote: Helga Zepp-LaRouche (Germany), Founder of the Schiller Institute
Dmitri Trenin (Russia), Professor, Academic Supervisor of the Institute of World Military Economy and Strategy at the Higher School of Economics University (Moscow)
H.E. Donald Ramotar (Guyana), former President of Guyana
H.E. Ján Čarnogurský (Slovakia), former Prime Minister of Slovakia
Prof. Zhang Weiwei (China), Professor of International Relations, Fudan University, China
Ambassador Chas W. Freeman, Jr. (U.S.), former U.S. Assistant Secretary of Defense for International Security Affairs, 1993-1994
Scott Ritter (U.S.), former UN Weapons Inspector in Iraq
Col. (ret.) Larry Wilkerson, (U.S.) former chief of staff to the US Secretary of State
Amb. Hossein Mousavian (Iran), former ambassador from Iran to Germany
